query: SELECT serviceCode, nameAr FROM lifecycle_services LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT serviceCode, nameAr FROM lifecycle_services LIMIT 5;
stdout:
serviceCode	nameAr
SRV-RERA-PROJ-REG	تسجيل مشروع جديد لدى RERA
SRV-RERA-ESCROW-OPEN	فتح حساب ضمان للمشروع
